usage.h1: font-heading font-bold text-5xl md:text-7xl tracking-tight uppercase
usage.h2: font-heading font-bold text-3xl md:text-5xl tracking-tight uppercase
usage.label: font-body text-xs font-medium tracking-wider uppercase text-zinc-500

layout.grid_marketing: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8 md:gap-12

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.outline: border border-input bg-background hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium transition-all active:scale-95

cards.base: rounded-lg border border-border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure text is WCAG AA compliant. Use zinc-400 for secondary text on zinc-950, not darker.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus rings are mandatory. Use ring-amber-500.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Barlow Condensed' for all headings to give that strong, industrial barber feel.
Use 'Manrope' for all body text for high legibility.
The theme is STRICTLY DARK MODE. Do not implement a light mode toggle unless explicitly asked later. Default to dark.
Use the 'Amber-500' (#F59E0B) as the primary brand color. It resembles gold/brass, fitting for a premium barber.
For the Dashboard: Use a 'Bento Grid' layout. Dense, information-rich, but with clear hierarchy.
For the Public Booking Page: Mobile-first is critical. Big touch targets (min 44px).
Use 'lucide-react' for icons. Scissors, Calendar, User, Clock are key icons.
Use 'recharts' for any analytics charts in the dashboard.
Ensure all forms use 'react-hook-form' and 'zod' for validation.
universal_guidelines: Avoid generic 'Bootstrap' layouts. Use asymmetry where possible.
Micro-interactions are key. Buttons should scale down slightly on click.
Use skeleton loaders instead of spinners for data fetching.
Error states should be clear and helpful, not just red borders.
